name: SWAP 50MILE Plan (12 weeks)
author: David Roche & Megan Roche, MD PhD
description: Bundled training plan imported from SWAP_Plans PDF templates.

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 3-10 mi easy
sessions.notes: 3-10 mi easy. Easy runs just mean relaxed, fun, mini adventures! Can be around the block or on trails or anything fun. High end of range is for very advanced athletes who are adapted to higher volume! Don’t overdo it. Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 4-12 mi easy or cross train 60-90 min
sessions.notes: 4-12 mi easy or cross train 60-90 min. Cross train can be bike, hike, ski, or anything else, with the time being flexible. Hiking in particular is an opportunity to improve ultra potential. Keep it mostly easy, but it’s ok to push some climbs and have fun!

sessions.pace_description: 3-10 mi easy Mtn legs
sessions.notes: 3-10 mi easy Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train (up to 90 min) or 3-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train (up to 90 min) or 3-6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 8-15 miles easy on trails
sessions.notes: 8-15 miles easy on trails. Vert is helpful to prepare for ultras, but don’t chase vert at the expense of all else. Later on, vert will be more important if you have access where you live. Hike with purpose when needed!

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy Can always add or substitute x-train on Sundays
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy Can always add or substitute x-train on Sundays. Added hikes (even all-day hikes) great too! Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy with 5 x 30 sec hills
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy with 5 x 30 sec hills. All easy runs can be on any terrain you like, and as you get confident, you can even end them with steady running. On the hill strides, think powerful and fast on a 6-8% grade ideally--you’ll be winded at the top. Embrace your athletic self! Can do strides anytime after halfway of the run.

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 6 x 90 sec hills mod/hard (think 5k effort)
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 6 x 90 sec hills mod/hard (think 5k effort) with run down recovery, 4 x 1 min hills mod/hard (push), 2-3 mi easy. VO2 hill workout! Optional easy double. On doubles, can be run, uphill treadmill, or x- train under an hour later in the day. 20-30 min is a sweet spot! Advanced training, only do if 100%. Mtn legs (bolded mountain legs means optional Speed Legs)

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy. Can add or sub easy x-train on Thurs too!

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy. Can even go longer with x- train if fun and healthy!

sessions.pace_description: 10-16 mi easy/mod on trails
sessions.notes: 10-16 mi easy/mod on trails. On easy/mod long runs, just run for fun without worrying about specific effort. Can push downhills a bit and find flow!

sessions.pace_description: 4-12 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec hills fast
sessions.notes: 4-12 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec hills fast. All Sunday runs ideally hilly too, vert is your friend on weekend! Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy with 6 x 20 sec hills No strength work these
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy with 6 x 20 sec hills No strength work these weekdays as body adapts!

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 5 x 2 min hills mod/hard (think 5k), 5 min
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 5 x 2 min hills mod/hard (think 5k), 5 min easy, 10 x 1 min fast/1 min easy on flat/rolling (think 5k), 2-3 mi easy/mod. Can progress effort on easy/mod running at the end, ending faster! Optional easy double

sessions.pace_description: 4-12 mi easy Optional easy double
sessions.notes: 4-12 mi easy Optional easy double

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 12-18 mi easy on trails (after a few-mile warm-up, do 20
sessions.notes: 12-18 mi easy on trails (after a few-mile warm-up, do 20 min mod/hard around 1- hour effort). Tempos within long runs make them play longer! In a perfect world, make the tempo net uphill. Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 5-14 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec hills fast or long hike
sessions.notes: 5-14 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec hills fast or long hike. Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 30 sec hills
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 30 sec hills

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 miles easy, 8 x 2 min fast/1 min easy, 3 min easy, 6 x
sessions.notes: 2-3 miles easy, 8 x 2 min fast/1 min easy, 3 min easy, 6 x 1 min fast/1 min easy, 3 min easy, 4 x 90 sec hills hard, 2-3 miles easy. Think 10k effort to start, progressing as you go, ending with HARD hills! Supercompensation intensity workout at week 4! Optional easy double Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 5-12 mi easy Optional easy double
sessions.notes: 5-12 mi easy Optional easy double

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 10-16 mi easy/mod on trails
sessions.notes: 10-16 mi easy/mod on trails. You should start feeling some fitness adaptations around this point! Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec hills
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec hills. Flow on downhills! Long hikes great on Sunday. Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy. Aerobic build week!

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy/mod over hills Optional easy double
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy/mod over hills Optional easy double

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy with 6 x 20 sec hills
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy with 6 x 20 sec hills

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 14-20 mi easy on trails (in the middle, do 30 min mod/hard
sessions.notes: 14-20 mi easy on trails (in the middle, do 30 min mod/hard around 1-hour effort)

sessions.pace_description: 8-13 mi easy on trails with 6 x 20 second hills Mtn legs
sessions.notes: 8-13 mi easy on trails with 6 x 20 second hills Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 5-12 mi easy with 6 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy
sessions.notes: 5-12 mi easy with 6 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy. On flatter strides, think as fast as you can go without straining. Usually 800m to mile effort

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 miles easy, 15 min mod/hard, thinking 10k effort, 5 min
sessions.notes: 2-3 miles easy, 15 min mod/hard, thinking 10k effort, 5 min easy, 6 x 2 min slight hills around 5k effort with run down recovery, 2-3 miles easy Optional easy double Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 5-12 mi easy Optional easy double
sessions.notes: 5-12 mi easy Optional easy double

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 18-26 mi easy on trails with strong downs
sessions.notes: 18-26 mi easy on trails with strong downs. Aiming for adaptations to tougher terrain! Finish feeling good if possible, strong fueling especially, taking your time and having fun! Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 10-14 mi easy on trails plus 8 x 30 sec steep hills at the
sessions.notes: 10-14 mi easy on trails plus 8 x 30 sec steep hills at the end. These hills will be tough! Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec fast/1 min easy
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec fast/1 min easy

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 6/5/4/3/2/1 min fast with 1 min easy recovery
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 6/5/4/3/2/1 min fast with 1 min easy recovery (think 10k effort), 5 min easy, 5 x 45 sec hills hard, 2-3 mi easy Optional easy double Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 6-10 mi easy Optional easy double
sessions.notes: 6-10 mi easy Optional easy double

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 4-8 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 4-8 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 12-16 mi easy/mod on trails (40 min mod/hard in middle
sessions.notes: 12-16 mi easy/mod on trails (40 min mod/hard in middle around 1-hour effort). This tempo will feel very tough by the end!

sessions.pace_description: 8-14 mi easy on trails with strong downs
sessions.notes: 8-14 mi easy on trails with strong downs. Can be long and fast hike! Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec hills
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec hills. Slight reduction in volume with focus on workouts this week!

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 5 x 3 min hills mod/hard with run down
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 5 x 3 min hills mod/hard with run down recovery, 15 min mod to mod/hard on tired legs, 2-3 mi easy. Think smooth, a very tough workout overall! No doubles this week as body adapts Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 5-8 mi easy
sessions.notes: 5-8 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: Race or race simulation! 1-2 mi easy warm-up, 20 mi
sessions.notes: Race or race simulation! 1-2 mi easy warm-up, 20 mi moderate (thinking 50- mile effort, with option to progress effort as you go), 1-2 mi easy cool-down. Can also do a marathon or 50k!

sessions.pace_description: Hike or rest
sessions.notes: Hike or rest. The main goal is recovery after race sim!

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 6-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec fast/1 min easy
sessions.notes: 6-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec fast/1 min easy. Big aerobic emphasis week!

sessions.pace_description: 10-15 mi easy/mod on trails
sessions.notes: 10-15 mi easy/mod on trails. Can progress this effort if feeling good! Optional double with permission to go a bit faster on trails. Big day, similar to Canova block but with aerobic focus No leg strength this week with big aerobic focus

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy Optional easy double
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy Optional easy double

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 4-8 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 4-8 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 20-25 mi easy on trails, ideally with vert
sessions.notes: 20-25 mi easy on trails, ideally with vert. Really relax into this effort, aiming to finish feeling great!

sessions.pace_description: Long hike or very easy run up to 16-20 miles on trails
sessions.notes: Long hike or very easy run up to 16-20 miles on trails. Aim for lots of time on feet, with fast hiking too!

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy plus 4 x 20 sec hills
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy plus 4 x 20 sec hills. This week, if feeling tired, start the taper and back off the volume slightly

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 10 x 3 min fast/90 seconds easy (think 1-hour
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 10 x 3 min fast/90 seconds easy (think 1-hour effort), 2-3 mi moderate on tired legs. Cruise intervals for final big threshold stimulus! Mtn legs Optional easy double, can go a bit faster on trails

sessions.pace_description: 6-10 mi easy Optional easy double
sessions.notes: 6-10 mi easy Optional easy double

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 3-8 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 3-8 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 14-20 miles easy/moderate on trails with steep downs with 1
sessions.notes: 14-20 miles easy/moderate on trails with steep downs with 1 hour moderate in the middle, thinking 50k effort, with option to progress. Steady effort for final specific adaptations! Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 10-14 mi easy on trails with steeps downs with 4 x 30 sec
sessions.notes: 10-14 mi easy on trails with steeps downs with 4 x 30 sec hills Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 4-8 mi easy with 4 x 30 sec fast/30 sec easy
sessions.notes: 4-8 mi easy with 4 x 30 sec fast/30 sec easy. Final strides before race to focus on aerobic system and ST-muscle fibers

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 20-30 min moderate around half marathon effort
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 20-30 min moderate around half marathon effort on trails, 5 min easy, 4 x 1 min hills around 5k effort, 2-3 mi easy. Final controlled tempo effort for neuromuscular and aerobic stimulus! Mtn legs. Final leg strength work!

sessions.pace_description: 4-8 mi easy
sessions.notes: 4-8 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 8-15 miles easy to easy/mod on trails
sessions.notes: 8-15 miles easy to easy/mod on trails. For advanced athletes, the solidly long run can be a good final aerobic stimulus

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 miles easy on trails or rest if any fatigue built up
sessions.notes: 4-10 miles easy on trails or rest if any fatigue built up

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 15 min moderate around marathon effort, 2-3 mi
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 15 min moderate around marathon effort, 2-3 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 3-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: 3-6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 2-4 mi easy in AM
sessions.notes: 2-4 mi easy in AM. Run the day before to keep rhythm

sessions.pace_description: 50 Mile Race! YOU ARE AMAZING!
sessions.notes: 50 Mile Race! YOU ARE AMAZING!

sessions.pace_description: 50 Mile Race! PROUD OF YOU!
sessions.notes: 50 Mile Race! PROUD OF YOU!
